name: protein-design-skills
description: Protein design pipeline: RFdiffusion backbone generation, ProteinMPNN sequence design, AlphaFold3 structure validation — skills + hooks + scripts
skillInstructions: This plugin uses Skills + Hooks + Standalone Scripts only. Read SKILL_INDEX.md to find relevant skills. Use scripts/ directory for tool execution: run_pdbfixer.py, run_rfdiffusion.py, run_proteinmpnn.py, run_alphafold3.py, run_boltz.py, run_chai1.py, run_esmfold.py, run_omegafold.py, run_openfold3.py, run_protenix.py, run_colabfold.py, run_esm_if1.py, run_ligandmpnn.py, run_filtering.py, convert_format.py, batch_runner.py, job_manager.py, summarize_outputs.py, project_dashboard.py. Install hooks for automation: python protein_design/hooks/install-hooks.py. For pipeline selection, read the pipeline-selection skill. For quick start, read the quickstart-guide skill.

interface.shortDescription: Protein design pipeline — skills + hooks + scripts
